name: Fresh company with HQ location
description: Fresh react_sdk_demo company decorated with a single HQ location (filing + mailing). This is the shared baseline for every company-onboarding spec that needs the Locations step to have a row to continue past — covers the canary suite, basic onboarding specs, deep onboarding, step navigation, and bank-account empty-state. Specs requiring more exotic setup (filing/mailing split, already-onboarded company) use their own dedicated scenarios.
